welcomeMessage.en: Today, we're going to talk about music and live concerts.
welcomeMessage.zh: 今天，我们将谈论音乐和现场演唱会。

welcomeMessage.en: We'll discuss our favorite artists, how music affects our mood, and our first concert experiences.
welcomeMessage.zh: 我们将讨论我们最喜欢的歌手、音乐如何影响我们的情绪，以及我们第一次看演唱会的经历。

welcomeMessage.en: Get ready to share the soundtrack of your life!
welcomeMessage.zh: 准备好分享你生活的主题曲吧！

questionsToThinkAbout.en: Who are your favorite musical artists or bands right now?
questionsToThinkAbout.zh: 你现在最喜欢的歌手或乐队是谁？

questionsToThinkAbout.en: How does music affect your mood when you are working, studying, or exercising?
questionsToThinkAbout.zh: 当你在工作、学习或锻炼时，音乐如何影响你的情绪？

questionsToThinkAbout.en: Have you ever been to a live concert? What was the experience like?
questionsToThinkAbout.zh: 你去过现场演唱会吗？那是一种怎样的体验？

questionsToThinkAbout.en: If you could learn to play any musical instrument perfectly, what would it be?
questionsToThinkAbout.zh: 如果你能完美地学会演奏任何一种乐器，你会选择什么？

questionsToThinkAbout.en: Do you prefer listening to upbeat pop music or relaxing classical music?
questionsToThinkAbout.zh: 你更喜欢听节奏欢快的流行音乐还是令人放松的古典音乐？

vocabulary.definition: A musical performance given in public, typically by several performers or of several separate compositions.
vocabulary.example: I bought tickets to see my favorite band in concert next month.

vocabulary.definition: A person who creates music or art.
vocabulary.example: She is a very talented musical artist who writes her own songs.

vocabulary.definition: A temporary state of mind or feeling.
vocabulary.example: Listening to cheerful music always puts me in a good mood.

vocabulary.translation: 节奏快的 / 令人愉快的
vocabulary.example: They played an upbeat song that made everyone want to dance.

vocabulary.definition: An object or device for producing musical sounds.
vocabulary.example: The piano and the guitar are very popular musical instruments.
I love this song because the lyrics are very touching and meaningful.

vocabulary.translation: 原声的 / 未经电声放大的
vocabulary.example: The singer performed a beautiful acoustic version of the song using only a guitar.

vocabulary.definition: To be the main performer at a concert or festival.
vocabulary.translation: 作为主要演员演出 / 头牌
vocabulary.example: Coldplay will headline the main stage at the music festival this weekend.
